claim: Kernel-expressibility coverage of the pinned TinyStories task-family corpus (1,709,765 tokens, corpus pin b6bcc9f6) is 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, 0.2210 at rung kernel-v0, 0.7841 at the wn31-aligned band — measured 2026-07-08 on the INCOMPLETE kernel-v0 + molecules-v0 instance as it existed that day. The number is corpus-indexed, rung-indexed, and kernel-state-indexed: per the verdict's extrapolation envelope it extrapolates to NO other corpus, rung, or kernel state, and is re-measured as the kernel grows.
backing_ref: registry/verdicts/m0b.json sha256 da475e98744ffe1dc635d2aa814c1955a120cef6b93dedef771af9d087fb7f0d; analysis-output sha256 63ce6485; audit CONFIRMED registry/audits/m0b/1-gate-a-codex.json
notes: CORRECTION ENTRY: this claim had been narrated in programme discussion as the kernel's 'natural coverage' (a general property). That framing strips all three indices and was an unlicensed EXTRAPOLATION stated as fact — the motivating incident for this register (docs/next/assumption-register.md section 7). Doc-level fixes applied 2026-07-09 in docs/next/arch-survey.md and docs/next/00-programme-2-overview.md.

claim: A coverage level of roughly 0.35 would also hold on corpora other than the pinned TinyStories task family (e.g. the D-EXT external slice, general web text, or any later eval corpus).
resolution_path: Re-run the m0b census machinery (tools/experiments/m0b_instrument.py, deterministic, ~$0 on-box) on each new corpus BEFORE any design cites a coverage number for it or powers a covered-slice test on it. Live warning that this projection is doubtful: the f2 external slice showed zero item flips on D-EXT (registry/verdicts/f2.json sha256 38422b3c...) — in-house-slice behaviour did not transfer, and D-EXT lemma coverage is an open diagnosis question in the F2 post-mortem.
notes: Filed as the open counterpart of ASM-0001: the exact projection the 'natural coverage' narration silently asserted. May motivate queueing a census run; may not premise any decision while open.

claim: TinyStories task-family content-word mass is an adequate Tier-0 proxy for eval-relevant content when evaluating the NICHE-SCOPE coverage gate (pre-declared default X=0.20).
rationale: Ratified at GNG-0 as the pre-declared gate corpus for the R0/R1 rungs: cheap, pinned, deterministic census substrate matched to the small-model task family in use. Revisit condition: any experiment whose eval corpus is not TinyStories-derived must gate on a census of ITS OWN corpus (see ASM-0002 resolution path), and the proxy stipulation lapses for frontier-scale task families.
notes: Registered retroactively so the coverage gate's premise is visible as a stipulation rather than passing as established fact.

claim: The L3a axiom/world layers read certain minted concept URNs as RELATIONS with a stipulated direction: molecules-v0 'mother' as the functional relation forward=(child -> mother) (the maintainer's mother(Elvis)=Gladys reading), 'father' likewise; kernel-v0 'maker-of' as forward=(maker -> artifact); kernel-v0 'part-of'/'has-part' as a mutually inverse pair. These concepts' explications are role/kind scenarios, not natively relational schemas; the relational reading is an alias stipulation of the L3a corpora, not a property of the concepts.
rationale: v0 has no natively minted relational concepts for the family litmus (has-parent/has-mother do not exist; design-constraint-layer.md section 1.4). Stipulating the reading lets the engine leg run today on real minted URNs. Revisit condition: when relational concepts (has-parent, has-mother, person) are minted natively, re-author axioms-v0/world-v0 against them and re-run as a successor id; the stipulation then lapses.

claim: The Presley anchor records in data/world-v0 (mother(elvis-presley)=gladys-presley, father=vernon-presley, lisa-marie's parents) are accurate public facts. They are AGENT-RECALLED, not extracted from a pinned external source, and are provenance-stamped 'public-fact-agent-recalled'.
rationale: The l3a verdict scores answers AGAINST THE RECORDS, so external accuracy of the anchor facts is not load-bearing for the verdict; the anchor exists so the maintainer's worked case is a literal eval item (q0001). Revisit condition: any experiment that scores against reality (not records) must re-source these facts via a provenance-pinned extraction route (FK-L3-2).

claim: The l3a-eval expected answers, though computed from the generator's construction tables through a code path separate from the engine's licensing/index pipeline, share an author and a repo with the engine; agreement between engine and eval is therefore evidence of internal consistency, and the strict refusal-code semantics is where the substantive test lives. Residual single-author circularity remains.
rationale: Tier-0 instrument-validation experiments in this programme accept generator-vs-implementation separation plus the cross-vendor audit as the independence mechanism (directives section 8). Revisit condition: the l3a audit (Codex/GPT-5.5) must specifically re-derive a sample of expected answers from data/world-v0 records independently; if it cannot, the PASS does not confirm.

claim: The A5 construct->concept mapping table is a stipulated modelling choice: extracted Python constructs are asserted classes of the minted code-v0 concepts (python-module, python-function, python-class) and edges are asserted under the minted code-v0 relation concepts (code-calls, code-defines, code-imports) plus the REUSED kernel-v0 part-of/has-part pair read as transitive lexical containment. Every mapping is by EXACT minted content-hash URN (X3 trap honoured); the adequacy of these six structural definitions as kernel concepts is stipulated, not evidenced, and the code-v0 records are structural definitions, NOT kot-ast/1 NSM explications.
rationale: v0 has no code-construct concepts; minting six structural-definition concepts through the canonical mint tool (content-addressed, corpus-specific profile kot-code-construct/1, precedent math-v0/pm-ast/1) lets the code vertical run today with exact concept identity. Revisit condition: when the idea-A sub-programme mints NSM-explicated code concepts, re-author code-axioms-v0/code-world-v0 against them and re-run as a successor id; the stipulation then lapses.

claim: The a5-eval expected answers, though computed from the generator's own construction tables (tools/axiom/gen_a5_corpora.py, which never imports the engine or the code query layer), share an author and a repo with the engine; agreement between engine and eval is therefore evidence of internal consistency, and the strict refusal-code semantics is where the substantive test lives. Residual single-author circularity remains.
rationale: Same independence mechanism as l3a/ASM-0006: generator-vs-implementation code-path separation plus the cross-vendor audit. Revisit condition: the a5 audit (Codex/GPT-5.5, run-vs-audit separation) must re-derive a sample of expected answers from data/code-corpus-v0 sources and data/code-world-v0 records independently; if it cannot, the PASS does not confirm.

claim: The extracted code-world-v0 records are the kot-code-extract/1 extractor's CONSERVATIVE STATIC assertions about the pinned snapshot corpus (exact-name call resolution only; corpus-internal imports only; immediate-child defines edges only; unresolvable constructs assert nothing). Their soundness/completeness with respect to Python RUNTIME semantics (dynamic dispatch, shadowing, monkey-patching) is not claimed and is not load-bearing: the a5 verdict scores answers AGAINST THE RECORDS.
rationale: Mirror of ASM-0005 (against-records scoring). Revisit condition: any successor that scores against ground-truth program behaviour (not records) must re-derive the graph with a soundness-validated extractor and register its own extraction-adequacy evidence.

claim: The f7 capstone's default reuse accounting — consuming each survivor's already-logged R1–R3 cells as Case-B comparator cells for the slope fit, paying GPU only for added rungs (R4/T*) plus one fresh full-arm overlap cell at R3 as the RC-5 reuse-consistency instrument — preserves the capstone's evidential value relative to a full re-run.
rationale: Design default set by docs/next/resource-optimization-plan.md §3.4-3. The slope estimand and margins are fixed in the DRAFT before added-rung data exists; the RC-5 overlap cell converts environment-equality from assumption to measurement. Revisit condition: gate-t5 dry-plan, where BOTH accountings (full re-run vs reuse) are disclosed and the maintainer ratifies one; a failed RC-5 overlap bound voids this stipulation and forces fresh lower-rung runs. Registered by the Fable Designer role (bead kernel-of-truth-utq).

claim: Folding reuse-maximising ordering INTO the frozen backlog score (mechanically derived L from registry/components.jsonl consumers + registry/artifact-ledger.jsonl, plus a producers-before-consumers tie-break) encodes the reuse priority at least as well as a standing separate ordering would, without creating a second prioritisation surface that could be cited selectively.
rationale: Design choice set by docs/next/resource-optimization-plan.md §4.4 amending research-engine §2.7. Revisit condition: the first generation boundary after the D3 backlog scorer lands — if re-scoring fails to reproduce the plan's §4.2 wave ordering, the discrepancy is a recorded finding to resolve there (companion to fork ENG-2). Registered by the Fable Designer role (bead kernel-of-truth-utq).

claim: REVISION-1 REWRITE (post-Codex-audit; supersedes the 2026-07-09 line above per last-line-wins). f7's survivor arms are OUTCOME-SELECTED (they survive f4/f6 verdicts), so RC-8 of the reuse ruling governs their already-seen R1–R3 cells: those cells may enter f7's confirmatory slope/capstone primary ONLY with fresh lower-rung reruns or pre-specified selection-adjusted inference frozen in the pinned analysis; otherwise the slope component is permanently exploratory. There is NO default reuse accounting: the gate-t5 dry-plan MUST present BOTH accountings — full lower-rung re-run AND reuse-adjusted with its evidential discount stated — for explicit maintainer decision, and the RC-5 fresh overlap cell at R3 is required under any accounting that mixes logged rows into any analysis.
rationale: The cross-vendor design audit (registry/audits/resource-optimization-plan/1-design-audit-codex.json) found the prior line's default — consuming survivor lower-rung cells as Case-B comparators inside a future confirmatory slope fit — a CRITICAL loophole (already-seen outcome-selected data determining a confirmatory primary) and found load_bearing:false unsound because the accounting choice is evidentially load-bearing for the capstone. Rewritten per audit amendments 2 and 6; machine-enforced by ERR_P2_REUSE_SURVIVOR (kot_common.check_record_reuse) and the kot-reg/2 outcome_selected_arms + selection_adjusted_inference fields. Revisit condition: the gate-t5 decision itself; a failed RC-5 overlap bound voids any reuse accounting and forces fresh lower-rung runs. Registered by the Fable Designer role (bead kernel-of-truth-utq, revision-1).

claim: REVISION-1 REWRITE (post-Codex-audit; supersedes the 2026-07-09 line above per last-line-wins). Folding reuse-maximising ordering INTO the frozen backlog score encodes the reuse priority without a second citable prioritisation surface, PROVIDED the derived L is validated against STRUCTURED registry edges — non-CLOSED registry/experiments/*.json depends_on + pins.corpus_hashes names and registry/ideas.jsonl requires/dependencies edges — rather than the free-text consumers lists in registry/components.jsonl, which are narrative and gameable. `tools/registry/reuse-check.py lscore` is the derivation + mismatch report; a Fable scorer override of a derived L requires a written justification committed with the stub (GZ-4), so overrides are audit-visible.
rationale: The cross-vendor design audit found free-text consumers gameable as an L input (amendment 6). The structured derivation is deterministic and mechanically checkable; known residual: several non-corpus components (engines/harnesses) currently have free-text-only edges — lscore flags these as MISMATCH rather than silently scoring them, and the structured edge set grows as records/ideas declare dependencies. Revisit condition unchanged: the first generation boundary after the D3 backlog scorer lands — if re-scoring fails to reproduce the plan's section 4.2 wave ordering, the discrepancy is a recorded finding (companion to fork ENG-2). Registered by the Fable Designer role (bead kernel-of-truth-utq, revision-1).

claim: The a5-llm prompt pack (preamble, toy-world few-shot examples, 8 query-render templates), record->English renderer, refusal-marker regexes, and answer normaliser are a stipulated pro-LLM-lenient instrument: every scoring asymmetry (lenient set/boolean match, any-refusal on controls, no provenance requirement) runs in the LLM arms' favour, so engine-superiority readings are conservative. Results are indexed to this instrument identity; changing any element post-freeze is an instrument version change requiring a correction record.
resolution_path: Pre-freeze toy-world probe pilot (30 synthetic queries, never a5-eval items) decides FK-A5L-1; the in-run extraction gate (Wilson-LB >= 0.90 per cell) is the mechanical check; the Codex audit reviews the leniency direction.
notes: a5-llm design premise. Fairness asymmetries enumerated in the design note section 3.4/3.5.
rationale: The programme proceeds on this stipulated pro-LLM-lenient instrument because every scoring asymmetry runs in the LLM arms' favour, so any engine-superiority reading it yields is conservative and safe to act on.

claim: The a5-llm record->text rendering plus rendered axiom block is a faithful kernel-as-text (Law-2) form of the same content the engine consumes, and the exact-slug-complete deterministic retrieval makes the llm-rag arm an ORACLE-STRONG null that upper-bounds deployable RAG on this slice.
resolution_path: Build-time retrieval-completeness lint (expected-answer support records subset-of retrieved set, /analysis/retrieval_completeness_violations = 0) mechanically verifies completeness; faithfulness of the rendering is reviewed at the Codex audit.
notes: a5-llm design premise; the differentiator claim is earned against this strongest-form null or not at all.
rationale: The programme proceeds because the rendered record is a faithful Law-2 kernel-as-text form and the exact-slug-complete retrieval upper-bounds deployable RAG, so a differentiator earned against this arm is earned against the strongest available null.

claim: The pinned SmolLM2-Instruct checkpoint revisions (2024) predate the 2026-07-09 code-corpus-v0 snapshot of this repo's own tooling, so the llm-direct arms are closed-book on the evaluated facts by construction; their honest role is the fabrication/refusal surface plus the scale sign, never a knowledge claim.
resolution_path: Not directly verifiable (training-set membership); the dated-artifact argument stands unless a checkpoint revision is ever un-pinned or the snapshot provenance changes — either voids this stipulation.
notes: a5-llm design premise; disclosed in the envelope (direct arms measure fabrication/refusal, not knowledge).
rationale: The programme proceeds because the pinned pre-snapshot checkpoints make the direct-LLM arms closed-book on the evaluated facts by construction, so their honest role is the fabrication/refusal surface and the scale sign, never a knowledge claim.

claim: The kot-query/1 define-op is the closed two-shape operator DEFINE (retrieve a concept's endorsed genus-differentia definition at one level, verbatim) plus DEFINE-MATCH (exact structural set-equality of a candidate definition against it); there is no third shape and any addition is a grammar-version change.
rationale: The programme proceeds on the two-shape surface because DEFINE + DEFINE-MATCH is the minimal grammar that makes definitional items checkable; the stipulation falls only if a third definitional question-class is found unrepresentable.
notes: define-op design premise (memo ASM-DEF-1).

claim: In DEFINE-MATCH a licensed definitive false is sound (unlike lookup/instance which refuse on absence) because a logicalDefinition is a closed, complete object about its own definiendum, so 'candidate != X's endorsed definition' is a licensed negative, not a CWA incompleteness.
rationale: The programme proceeds because definitional closure — the endorsed definition is the whole, complete stipulation about X — licenses a definitive negative that makes def-MMLU distractor options checkable; the cross-vendor audit is the check and if false-licensing proves unsound the op reverts to DEFINE-only.
notes: define-op design premise (memo ASM-DEF-2); its audit is the §7.4 kill check.

claim: The definitional licence is a stratum-3, corpus-scoped 'definitional' endorsement record admitting a pinned onto-obo shard's logicalDefinitions (by shard name + sourceVersion sha) as a definitional-source, with an optional per-concept override retained.
rationale: The programme proceeds on corpus-scoped granularity because a shard shares one provenance, semanticStatus, licence and extraction sha, so a single shard-scoped endorsement keeps the governance act legible and cheap while the per-concept override still allows dis-endorsing a contested definition.
notes: define-op design premise (memo ASM-DEF-3).

claim: 'definitional' is a new kot-axiom/1 endorsement-kind, disjoint from the extension-constraint kinds {functional, cardinality, disjointWith, inverseOf, domain, range}; it is validated and consumed only by the define-op and never enters the CWA store-validation pass over world-layer facts.
rationale: The programme proceeds on the disjoint endorsement-kind because keeping the definitional endorsement (stratum-3 governance) out of the world-layer CWA pass preserves strata separation: definitions stay in identity/hash, endorsements stay a sidecar governance act.
notes: define-op design premise (memo ASM-DEF-4).

claim: The WiC / definitional-MMLU kappa_B yield of the define-op is a projection, not a measured quantity: the substrate is biomedical (GO/PO) and WiC is general-vocabulary, so the define-checkable yield may be small or ~0.
resolution_path: The b-cov census re-run (docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §7.2 / docs/next/architecture-ladder.md §10.1, Tier 0, ~$0, CPU-only) measures kappa_B^engine for gold-parse and mapper-parse before/after the op lands; the measured delta converts this projection. NEVER a premise for building the op or any downstream claim.
notes: define-op EXTRAPOLATION (memo ASM-DEF-5); non-load-bearing, resolved by the census.

claim: The define mapper leg is a closed pinned template inventory plus an onto-obo annotation-label->URN index reusing the mapper's abstain-on-ambiguity discipline (exactly-one-URN maps; more-than-one abstains; zero unmapped); it resolves no word sense and no ambiguous label, so a mapper-parse is emitted only when TERM/GENUS/REL/FILLER each resolve to exactly one URN.
rationale: The programme proceeds on closed-templates + abstain-on-ambiguity because it reuses the mapper's existing verified discipline so no sense or ambiguous label is silently resolved, and the census prices the gold-parse-vs-mapper-parse loss separately rather than the design guessing it.
notes: define-op design premise (memo ASM-DEF-6).

claim: Kernel-tradition familiarity of LLM judges: NSM literature and NSM-style explications are plausibly in GPT-5.x training data, so an LLM filling the judge-1 role may endorse a familiar explication STYLE rather than judge content from concept competence, biasing the f2b-transfer-llmproxy endorsement statistic A_1p in an unproven direction (plausibly upward). Kernel-INSTANCE-naivety is enforced by E5 context control; kernel-TRADITION-naivety cannot be.
notes: f2b-transfer-llmproxy design (judge-1 LLM stand-in); asymmetric-reading clause depends on the PLAUSIBILITY not the truth of the upward direction.
resolution_path: Run the human-judged f2b-transfer stage-1 (the frozen record's own path) and compare its A against A_1p on the identical 360 items: the difference measures the LLM-judge bias directly. Interim bound: the deranged-gloss probe gate (false-endorsement point-rate >= 0.30 invalidates) bounds the crudest style-endorsement form. NEVER a premise: the llmproxy envelope caps any PASS at weak-feasibility-proxy independent of this entry.

backing_ref: poc/f2b-transfer/llmproxy-design.md S1/S2; registry/experiments/f2b-transfer-llmproxy.json envelope clause 4; maintainer stand-in request 2026-07-09
claim: Decision value of an LLM endorsement proxy: a blind, escape-equipped, instance-naive LLM judge's endorsement of the kernel's record content is treated as a programme-sequencing input (continue investment vs pause the verifier-content line) while the human judge-1 is unavailable. It is never evidence toward H-TRANSFER, never a substitute for f2b-transfer stage-1, and never licenses f2b-transfer stage-2 spend.
notes: f2b-transfer-llmproxy design premise; falls away when the human round runs (resolution of ASM-0021 supersedes the proxy's decision role).
rationale: The programme proceeds on the proxy because the human annotator is unavailable and a fast kill-(d)-shaped read (a FAIL fires at ~zero cost and pauses the line before further investment) is worth one judge-day and <$10; the envelope makes over-reading a PASS mechanically citable-against.

claim: A seeded synthetic 3-generation-family 2-hop composition eval (data/nsk1-eval: 1000 covered + 100 uncovered-control items over kot-world/1 records reusing the minted mother-of/father-of/man/woman kernel concepts, all facts in-context, gold labels from generator graph traversal) is an adequate grounding-sensitive covered task family for the FIRST decisive internal-vs-external kernel-loop comparison at R1-R2. Adequacy here means: composition failure is a real small-model failure mode on this shape (the back-patching literature's 2-hop setting), coverage of the covered stratum is by construction, and gold labels are independent of the kot-axiom engine's accept test (the engine resolves hop-1 only). It does NOT mean results transfer to natural corpora or public benchmarks.
backing_ref: docs/design-neurosym-kernel-internals.md section 4; data/nsk1-eval/manifest.json; f2b oracle-leakage lesson (registry/experiments/f2b-replicate.json)
rationale: Cheapest-decisive-first: the 2-hop composition shape is the one setting where (a) the back-patch literature gives a measured layer-timing failure mode to intervene on, (b) the l3a-PASS engine can resolve hop-1 with an axiom license, and (c) gold labels can be made structurally independent of the engine accept test. A natural-corpus task would import the unmeasured NL-parse boundary (l3a-parse, unrun) into the first decisive experiment and confound the internal-vs-external question this line exists to answer.
resolution_path: nsk1 Stage-0 headroom + rescuable-fraction gates decide adequacy empirically; a public-benchmark covered-slice variant is staged as a later variant of idea-neurosym-kernel-internals

claim: The back-patch rescuable fraction measured on general 2-hop factual queries (up to 66%, arXiv:2406.12775) extends at useful magnitude to the nsk1 kernel-covered synthetic 2-hop slices at R1-R2 (SmolLM2-135M/360M).
resolution_path: nsk1 Stage-0 measures the rescuable fraction directly on the covered slice; the pre-declared floor (Wilson-LB >= 0.15 over swept failures) converts this into a family-level cheap kill

claim: Function-vector / contrastive-activation-addition steering effects, measured at task granularity in the literature, are extractable and causally effective at ENTITY/CONCEPT granularity (one cached vector per world-entity, exact-hash addressed) on SmolLM2-135M/360M.
resolution_path: nsk1 Stage-1 calibration split measures per-entity steering-cache validity (cache-extraction gate) before the final campaign; failure of the gate falls back to the kernel-gated activation-modulation channel (FK-NSK-1 option b) or kills the write channel

claim: The NL-boundary leg is pre-registered under record topology FK-NLB-1 option (b): TWO records (l3a-parse, a5-nl), TWO per-vertical verdicts, ONE shared harness whose files are pinned byte-identically in both records. Each vertical's kill (HL3a clause 2 / its HA5 analog) can fire independently, and no cross-vertical pooled average may stand in for a per-vertical verdict. This record topology is a methodology CHOICE of the programme: the frozen parents' per-vertical successor pre-declarations are its backing, but the two-record/one-harness execution shape is stipulated, not measured.
backing_ref: registry/experiments/l3a.json + registry/experiments/a5.json design.n_planned.successors (the frozen parents each pre-declare a SEPARATE successor id gated on their own verdict); docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md section 2 fork FK-NLB-1 + section 13
rationale: Two records let the parents' kill clauses fire independently - pooling verticals would smuggle a cross-vertical average into a per-vertical kill decision - while the shared harness (byte-identical pins in both records) keeps the instrument identical, so a cross-vertical difference indicts the vertical, not the tooling. Revisit condition: never while the parent records stay frozen (the FK-NLB-1 fork row is re-opens-never); if either parent record is ever superseded, the topology re-opens with its successor. Registered by the Fable designer role (nl-boundary line).
resolution_path: Not a projection to resolve: the stipulation lapses only if a frozen parent record is superseded; any consolidation into a single pooled record would be a NEW design record minting new ids, never an amendment of these two.
notes: FK-NLB-1 record-topology stipulation; cited by the section 13 DECISION line of docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md. Registered 2026-07-10 to close ERR_ASM_UNTAGGED_PREMISE on that line: a methodology decision is STIPULATED, not MEASURED - the parents' pre-declarations back it, they do not constitute it.

backing_ref: docs/next/eval-necessity-adjudication.md section 2 (maintainer-adjudicated pivot); arXiv:1908.06177 (2019); registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json (the provenance-triple lesson)
claim: The CLUTRR covered slice - clean k=2 rows of the public CLUTRR release (Sinha et al. 2019, arXiv:1908.06177; repo facebookresearch/clutrr; licence CC-BY-NC-4.0) whose proof chain is up-edge-only over {mother, father} and whose released gold relation word (target_text) is in {grandmother, grandfather}, with the engine world store derived MECHANICALLY from the structured story_edges/genders columns (no NL parse anywhere), pooled across configs and task_split values, story-bytes-deduplicated, with per-item closed name lexicons - is an adequate PRIMARY grounding-sensitive covered task family for the first decisive internal-vs-external kernel-loop comparison (nsk1) at R1-R2, with the custom nsk1-eval corpus demoted to (i) the L*/alpha calibration split plus custom Stage-0 heatmap input and (ii) a named self-authored secondary stratum. Adequacy here means: third-party provenance of items and gold removes the designer-degrees-of-freedom and optics channels of a self-authored primary; coverage is restored by a committed mechanical filter, machine-checkable at build; and the released gold stays disjoint from the engine accept test (the engine resolves hop-1 only, and the rendered feedback never contains the gold word - build assertion). It does NOT mean results transfer to uncovered CLUTRR strata (k>2, noise configs, sibling/spouse/in-law chains), to the published CLUTRR benchmark task or leaderboard, or to natural corpora. Residual risks carried by this stipulation: pretraining contamination (public since 2019; the primary is a within-item arm contrast, symmetric in first order; headroom compression is priced by the pre-freeze gate), programme authorship of the covered-slice filter (a committed, auditable pure function), and patchscope-extraction difficulty on natural-ish story text (priced by the extraction-failure gate and the pre-freeze headroom blocker with its fallback ladder). Supersedes ASM-0023.
rationale: The maintainer's challenge and the external review both flagged the self-authored flagship eval as the programme's most visible weakness; CLUTRR is the rare public benchmark whose released structured columns (story_edges, edge_types, genders, proof_state, f_comb, target_text) preserve the design's entire honesty structure - gold-label independence, coverage-by-filter, matched-budget arm symmetry, mechanical non-NL world-store derivation - while making item text, name distribution, distractor placement, question format and gold into bytes the programme cannot have tuned. The custom corpus is retained only where third-party data cannot substitute: tuning-side calibration (strict tuning/eval provenance separation) and a named secondary stratum so an extraction-driven INSTRUMENT-INVALID on the new surface cannot leave the family with zero information for the GPU spent.
resolution_path: Pre-freeze mechanical gates decide the fallback-ladder rung that actually freezes: the covered-slice count gate (n_final >= 1000 full power; 600 <= n_final < 1000 power recomputed at achieved n before freeze; < 600 falls back) and the ~USD 2-5 headroom calibration on a discarded seed-pinned 100-item slice (text-only accuracy in [0.05, 0.85] AND external-text >= text-only + 2pp, per rung, both rungs) with the pre-declared ladder (native relation task -> entity-question form -> custom corpus primary); the frozen record names the rung. The stipulation itself is resolved or explicitly re-registered at nsk1 verdict time.

backing_ref: docs/design-neurosym-kernel-internals.md section 4; data/nsk1-eval/manifest.json; f2b oracle-leakage lesson (registry/experiments/f2b-replicate.json)
claim: A seeded synthetic 3-generation-family 2-hop composition eval (data/nsk1-eval: 1000 covered + 100 uncovered-control items over kot-world/1 records reusing the minted mother-of/father-of/man/woman kernel concepts, all facts in-context, gold labels from generator graph traversal) is an adequate grounding-sensitive covered task family for the FIRST decisive internal-vs-external kernel-loop comparison at R1-R2. Adequacy here means: composition failure is a real small-model failure mode on this shape (the back-patching literature's 2-hop setting), coverage of the covered stratum is by construction, and gold labels are independent of the kot-axiom engine's accept test (the engine resolves hop-1 only). It does NOT mean results transfer to natural corpora or public benchmarks.
notes: SUPERSEDED 2026-07-10 by ASM-0027 (append-only last-line-wins update; the id is not reused). The eval-necessity adjudication (docs/next/eval-necessity-adjudication.md section 2), on maintainer challenge plus external review and while nsk1 was still DRAFT, re-decided FK-NSK-3: the custom nsk1-eval corpus is no longer the PRIMARY eval surface for nsk1; it is demoted to the L*/alpha calibration split and a named self-authored secondary stratum, roles now carried inside ASM-0027. The original adequacy-as-primary stipulation is withdrawn as superseded, not measured false.
rationale: Cheapest-decisive-first: the 2-hop composition shape is the one setting where (a) the back-patch literature gives a measured layer-timing failure mode to intervene on, (b) the l3a-PASS engine can resolve hop-1 with an axiom license, and (c) gold labels can be made structurally independent of the engine accept test. A natural-corpus task would import the unmeasured NL-parse boundary (l3a-parse, unrun) into the first decisive experiment and confound the internal-vs-external question this line exists to answer.
resolution_path: Superseded by ASM-0027; see its resolution_path.

backing_ref: docs/next/eval-necessity-adjudication.md sections 0-1 (premises tagged there: the zero-audited-end-task-wins null bound and the m0b coverage caveat)
claim: Adoption criterion for standard benchmarks across the programme's eval designs (the eval-necessity adjudication rule): an out-of-the-box benchmark replaces or supplements a custom eval exactly where it (a) actually exercises the kernel-covered slice and (b) preserves the experiment's estimand and provenance-independence structure (who authored the ITEMS, the GOLD, and the GRADER/VERIFIER); it is refused where it would be a null instrument (never touches the covered slice) or would rename the estimand. Applied 2026-07-10 across the three pending designs: nsk1 SWAP to the CLUTRR covered slice (ASM-0027); truthstyle-2x2 SUPPLEMENT with an LLMBar judge-calibration side-record while the custom 2x2 stays primary (ASM-0029); f2b-errors KEEP custom with no import (ASM-0030).
notes: A methodology rule, not a projection; re-examined whenever a new eval design adopts or refuses a public benchmark. The nsk1 instance resolves through ASM-0027's pre-freeze gates.
rationale: The maintainer's prior - self-authored evals are the programme's documented weakness - cannot be applied uniformly, because the kernel's authored vocabulary is narrow (m0b coverage_fraction 0.3542, corpus-indexed on one pinned corpus and one incomplete kernel instance): an open-domain benchmark that never touches the covered slice measures nothing about the kernel and is a NULL INSTRUMENT, not a stronger one. The two-condition rule operationalises the prior with that caveat, and the provenance-triple framing generalises the measured f2b lesson (gold sharing provenance with the grader's accept test inflates results).

claim: For truthstyle-2x2, the custom d-ts 2x2 factorial (NSM-shaped vs plain register of the SAME content, crossed with truth, on the kernel's actual canonical gloss bytes) remains the primary and only verdict-bearing instrument: no public dataset contains NSM-register definitions, let alone content-matched two-register pairs of them, so a benchmark swap would rename the estimand into a different experiment. LLMBar (Zeng et al., arXiv:2310.07641; MIT; 419 instances) is adopted ONLY as an external judge-calibration side-record - a reported-only judge-quality card for the pinned 3-judge pool (adversarial accuracy per judge), never a gate on the 2x2 - and it must not delay the timing-critical freeze (the 2x2 must freeze before f2b-transfer Stage-2 unblinds).
rationale: The estimand is a within-pair style contrast on the kernel's own bytes - irreplaceable by construction - and the first-order self-authoring channel is absent because no endpoint scores agreement with kernel gold (tier-1's gate gold is WordNet-external). What an external benchmark CAN contribute is instrument calibration: LLMBar-Adversarial measures exactly the style-over-substance judge failure family on independently authored ground, and a judge scoring near chance there recontextualises any style-robust TOST PASS. A hard cross-format gate would over-couple two different formats (pairwise choice vs single-stimulus acceptance), so the calibration is reported-only and the binding instrument gate remains tier-1 wn31.

claim: For f2b-errors, the closed six-category error taxonomy stays hand-authored and pipeline-specific; no established process-benchmark taxonomy (ProcessBench / PRM800K-style earliest-erroneous-step labels) is imported, and nothing supplements the record. The record has no eval items to swap (it is a USD-0 consumer of f2b-transfer Stage-2 logs); its only custom artifact is a category schema plus a deterministic assignment tree that is a pure function of the pre-declared logged fields, and imported step-index categories would mint labels those fields cannot decide.
rationale: A descriptive taxonomy plus a cluster-bootstrap robustness primary cannot INFLATE a result - it can only qualify or undermine a Stage-2 PASS - so the self-authoring risk the adjudication polices is absent in kind here; ProcessBench labels earliest-erroneous-step indices in step-indexed math chains, and the f2b verify-retry loop has no step chain (its failure modes are loop-mechanics categories: extraction failure, non-engagement, gold-conflict, exhaust-stable/wander), so importing its categories would mint undecidable labels - exactly the storytelling the design doc already rejected; and the record dies as a confirmatory instrument the moment Stage-2 unblinds, so any benchmark-flavoured redesign spends confirmatory standing to buy nothing.

claim: The knull TOST primary's power-planning bound is power 0.65-0.95 at margin 0.05, n=1000 paired skeletons, derived from f2b-measured variance scaled plus mock half-width under arm-independent stub noise. It is a planning constant, never a measurement.
rationale: A power-planning constant sets the pre-registered sample size and cannot inflate a result. Resolution: the realized CI width at analysis supersedes the planning bound.

claim: The authored plain-dictionary-register store (LLM-drafted, Claude/Fable family != SmolLM2 host family, linter-gated) does not advantage or disadvantage the plain arm's verify-acceptance dynamics beyond what the within-arm baseline and difficulty gate absorb.
rationale: The plain store is the content-vs-alignment control; a style-familiarity residual would confound it. Resolution: the truthstyle-2x2 style-axis readout plus knull's own difficulty gate plus the per-type descriptive table bound the residual.

claim: Holding the oracle-favourable construction fixed across all arms isolates the CONTENT variable; gold-label independence is explicitly out of scope for knull (f2b-transfer owns that axis).
rationale: knull measures the content-vs-alignment axis with construction held fixed; the orthogonal gold-label-independence axis is f2b-transfer's. Resolution: f2b-transfer Stage-2 human read settles gold-label independence.

claim: The StubLM chars/4 token proxy is mock-mechanics only; the mock flops_parity=false artifact (design section 4.3) carries no information about the real FLOPs-parity gate, whose pre-freeze evidence is the pinned-tokenizer G-3 artifact (opaque token ratio 1.004).
rationale: The mock's chars/4 proxy undercounts nonce tokens ~2x, so mock flops_parity is a known artifact not evidence. Resolution: the run-time HFLM-metered FLOPs ledger measures the real gate.

claim: g8's forward map F is statement-only at the doc-gen4 layer: definition-kind declarations count OUT of the fragment (reason definiens-unavailable-at-layer). This undercounts n_in_fragment.
rationale: Undercounting in-fragment is conservative for the PASS side and mildly anti-conservative for the fragment_wilson_ub<=0.01 FAIL rule; the def-kind reject count is carried in the metrics so the verdict prose can qualify it. Resolution: the ntp-toolkit primary route (bead kernel-of-truth-ncv) resolves def-kind statements.

claim: g8 location verification admits the top-level eq/iff operand swap and no other equivalence; both orientations derive deterministically from the same record.
rationale: A pre-declared admissible-orientation set keeps verification deterministic and content-equality-based. Resolution: both orientations derive from the pinned record, auditable.

claim: The 9 Primitive g8 targets verify by pinned anchor-name-table equality, weaker than content equality and instrument-authored (pre-declared oracle-leakage: the gold for 9/39 targets IS the instrument's anchor table); per-mode located counts are reported so the endpoint is auditable by mode.
rationale: The anchor-table route is disclosed as a weaker, per-mode-reported oracle for the 9 Primitive targets; statement-mode (30) uses full canonical-content equality. Resolution: per-mode counts in the metrics let the verdict reader down-weight the Primitive mode.

claim: g8's F does no definitional-equality aliasing (n+1 is add(n,one), never succ n); pretty-printer defeq renderings therefore miss, a conservative undercount for both gate and locale.
rationale: No-defeq-alias keeps F a deterministic syntactic map; the cost is a conservative undercount, disclosed. Resolution: recorded in the reason histogram so the verdict prose carries the caveat.

claim: The g8 fragment rate rises materially as the kernel's mapped-constant inventory grows.
backing_ref: results-log/g8.jsonl seq 0 gate_reject_reasons (720/1000 unmapped-constant first-failures); registry/experiments/g8.json envelope
rationale: 720/1000 g8 fragment misses died on unmapped-constant (the kernel-size axis the frozen envelope names) - a FIRST-failure upper bound on the size-attributable share (later gates untested on them), so this stays EXTRAPOLATION not a premise.
resolution_path: pre-registered bulk-authoring regression re-run of the g8 fragment gate at 1e4-1e5 kernel records + ntp-toolkit definiens-layer re-score

claim: B-prime host/cell selection rule: the nsk1 Stage-0 back-patch rescuable-fraction diagnostic is interpretable as a LAYER-TIMING probe only on a (host, form, shot) cell whose text-only accuracy is measured in-window ([0.05, 0.85]) - where no arm shows composition, a 'rescue' cannot be attributed to latent capability rather than perturbation noise. Per G2d the only zero-shot in-window CLUTRR cell is SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct on the entity form (text-only 0.76, n=100, phase:exploratory), so B-prime runs single-host at R3 = SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct, zero-shot, CLUTRR entity form (form 2). Excluded: the 135M few-shot pass cell (single-rung, text-only 0.09 guess-floor-adjacent, adds a few-shot construct change), the custom surface at R3 (text-only 0.10, double-barrelled-surname truncation confound), and both tiny hosts zero-shot (no measured composition in any arm).
backing_ref: poc/nsk1/out/g2d/g2d_summary.json sha256 93a6e951f6f8c9bcf648f704686c289241a5ac3238955df9d9846336b10b12d0; docs/next/nsk1-ladder-exhaustion.md section 6 rank 3; registry/assessments/nsk1-g2d.json
rationale: A rescuable-fraction floor is a statement about WHERE a capable computation fails in depth; it presupposes the capability exists somewhere in the host on this task. R3 zero-shot entity is the only cell where that precondition is measured, and it is simultaneously the cell where the text channel is measured strictly harmful (0 rescues, 33/76 breakage), making it the most informative site for the flagship's internal-vs-external question. Revisit condition: if B-prime PASSes and the redesigned record wants a second rung, the 360M-Instruct few-shot entity cell (text-only 0.77, exploratory) is the pre-identified candidate and requires its own diagnostic before use.

claim: Amended Stage-0 decision rule for entity-form (two-candidate-effective) surfaces: the design's bare any-grid-cell-yields-gold rescue criterion is noise-inflatable on form 2, because after the anti-echo scorer the per-item answer space is effectively {bridge, chain-top} - an arbitrary perturbation that merely flips the emitted name has roughly 0.5 per-cell 'rescue' probability and any-of-~35-cells compounds toward 1. B-prime therefore passes its floor ONLY on the two-conjunct rule: (i) one-sided Wilson 95% LB of any-cell rescue under the REAL self-patch >= 0.15 AND (ii) paired one-sided excess of real over the seed-pinned shuffled-source patch control (exact binomial on discordant items, alpha 0.05, real > control). The 0.15 floor VALUE is confirmed unchanged from the design; only the criterion gains the control conjunct.
backing_ref: docs/design-neurosym-kernel-internals.md section 4.2; docs/next/nsk1-ladder-exhaustion.md section 2b (the form-2 guess-floor recount); registry/experiments/nsk1.json stage0_floor
rationale: Keeps the pre-declared floor comparable to the frozen-intent design while making it un-passable by distribution damage (the arXiv:2410.17245 steering-fragility class). The shuffled-source control is the matched same-distribution perturbation price: same layer, same norm distribution, same plumbing, wrong item content. Revisit condition: if the CONTROL arm itself rescues at or above the floor, the form's rescue metric is declared uninterpretable and B-prime lands INCONCLUSIVE regardless of the real arm.

claim: Back-patch rescuability at useful magnitude (planning band 0.20-0.45 of swept text-only failures) extends to SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct on the CLUTRR covered entity slice. Basis: rescue of up to 66% of failed general 2-hop factual queries measured on substantially larger hosts; no measurement exists at 1.7B or on this slice.
backing_ref: arXiv:2406.12775 (2024), via reports/lit-structured-parsing-and-inner-symbolic.md section 2.2; ASM-0024 (the R1-R2 analogue, unresolved and now deprioritised)
resolution_path: B-prime itself (poc/nsk1/out/bprime/) measures the fraction directly against the amended floor; the planning band is used only to size the swept set and frame decidability, never as evidence or premise.

claim: B-prime pre-freeze contact discipline: B-prime runs text-only plus patched probes over ALL 958 covered CLUTRR items (858 final-set + 100 discarded headroom), because the built corpus has zero unused remainder (data/nsk1-clutrr/manifest.json counts.remainder_unused = 0, n_final_covered = 858) and the headroom slice alone (24 text-only failures at R3, n=100) cannot decide a 0.15 Wilson-LB floor. This contact is permissible under the record's freeze discipline because: (i) every B-prime row is phase:exploratory - quarantined, uncitable, flips no verdict; (ii) B-prime derives NO campaign selection parameter (L*/alpha stay custom-calibration-only per the design's section 5.3 rule; the B-prime heatmaps decide only the registered maintainer fork); (iii) covered-set membership is fixed by the committed S4 predicate, so per-item outcome knowledge cannot re-select items without a visible predicate change; (iv) any later frozen record on this corpus MUST disclose the B-prime contact verbatim and its skeptic memo must attack it explicitly.
rationale: The alternative - freezing a Tier-2 campaign at a host chosen on one n=100 exploratory cell, with the family kill living inside the frozen record - risks USD 30-70 on an undiagnosed host; cheapest-decisive-first prefers the ~USD 25 pre-freeze diagnostic at the cost of disclosed, quarantined item contact. Revisit condition: if the post-B-prime skeptic memo identifies a concrete exploitation channel from this contact, the campaign rebuilds fresh items (Phase-B configs or a new covered slice) instead of reusing the touched set.

claim: Adjudication-protocol operational feasibility transfers from the LLM stand-in to the human round: the blind rendering contract, position-pinned shuffle, working escape, and item decidability demonstrated end-to-end by judge-1p (preflight first-attempt pass; 360/360 items labelled, 0 no-labels; probe escape used correctly 59/60) predict that a kernel-naive human judge-1 can execute the same section-4 protocol on the same item bytes without instrument failure. Human attention span, fatigue, and labelling ergonomics are unmeasured and differ from per-item stateless API calls.
resolution_path: The human-judged f2b-transfer Stage-1 itself: its adjudication and probe instrument gates either hold (resolving this measured) or fire INSTRUMENT-INVALID (resolving it against). Never a premise: no schedule, budget, or design decision may rest on this entry; it exists so the operational-de-risk sentence in the llmproxy assessment carries a registered, non-load-bearing tag.

claim: FORK-4 format transfer for truthstyle-2x2: the single-stimulus yes/no/cannot-say acceptance format stands in for the f2b-line judging acts (S1 fit+identification with the S6 register-immunity instruction, and the MCQ/best-fit claim-endorsement readings) for the purpose of the style-leak guard - a style main effect bounded at +/-0.10 in single-stimulus acceptance is read as bounding the style channel of f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings at that margin. Single-stimulus acceptance is a DIFFERENT judging act from MCQ best-fit comparison; the transfer is a design choice, not a measurement.
backing_ref: docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md section 1.4 FORK-4 and section 3.1; registry/experiments/truthstyle-2x2.json (consumer_rule, extrapolation_envelope_verbatim)
rationale: Replicating the f2b MCQ format would confound style with the S2 best-fit comparison and make acceptance-rate cells non-independent, destroying clean identification of the style main effect; the factorial requires single-stimulus cells. The stipulation is disclosed in the record's envelope and priced by the conservative consumer rule. Revisit condition / resolution path: if the probe reads LEAKY (FAIL), an MCQ-format successor cell is the pre-registered path before any format-specific conclusion is drawn.

claim: truthstyle-2x2 power-planning constants: paired-discordance rate q <= 0.20 and concept-cluster ICC ~ 0.2 (design effect ~ 2, effective n ~ 300 of the up-to-600 paired differences), giving TOST power >= 0.99 at true effect 0 and >= 0.86 at true |effect| 0.03 at margin 0.10, with the FAIL direction well-powered only for leaks >= ~0.15. These are planning constants used solely to size the item budget and characterise the power surface; they are never emitted as measurements and no verdict consumes them - the verdict is a pure function of the pinned concept-cluster bootstrap over observed labels.
rationale: No measurement of judge discordance on d-ts register pairs exists at $0 pre-freeze spend, so q and ICC must be stipulated to size the design; their failure mode (higher-than-planned discordance => underpowered straddle) resolves to INCONCLUSIVE, which the pre-declared conservative consumer rule prevents from ever being cited as reassurance. Revisit condition: if observed discordance exceeds ~0.30 the readout is expected INCONCLUSIVE and a larger-n successor (FORK-5 successor margin 0.05 needs ~4x budget) is the path.

claim: Style robustness measured on the truthstyle-2x2 pinned 3-LLM judge pool (GPT-5.6-Sol, GPT-5.5, Claude-Haiku-4.5) extends to HUMAN judges on the f2b line, in particular the pending kernel-naive human judge-1 whose Stage-1 A reading the probe cannot clear (FORK-3: any human who judges d-ts items becomes permanently ineligible as an f2b-transfer judge under LS-4, so no human is measured here). Human style/familiarity susceptibility on NSM-register text is unmeasured and may differ in either direction from the LLM pool's.
backing_ref: docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md sections 1.4 FORK-3 and 4; registry/experiments/truthstyle-2x2.json extrapolation_envelope_verbatim
resolution_path: A post-Stage-1 human style rider on FRESH items (never run before f2b-transfer Stage-1 completes, preserving LS-4 judge eligibility). Until resolved, no human-judge reading may cite truthstyle-2x2 as style clearance - the record's envelope forbids it explicitly and this entry is never a premise for any schedule, budget, or design decision.

claim: truthstyle-2x2 tier-2 truth labels read the concept's OWN canonical gloss as truth-correct and the length-adjacent deranged-donor gloss as truth-wrong (own-gloss-is-correct). Under H-CIRC some 'correct' labels would be false. The split is construction-fixed provenance (own vs donor), never verifier-computed, so it stays well-defined regardless of whether the labels are right; the PRIMARY endpoint pools both truth levels so the record's PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE never rests on this stipulation - only the MEANING of the truth-split Holm members (wrong-cell style inflation, correct-cell TOST) leans on it.
backing_ref: docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md sections 3.1 and 6.1 item 1; registry/experiments/truthstyle-2x2.json (arms_mandatory_baselines, kill_criterion_verbatim)
rationale: The only alternative gold source for canonical-gloss content is the kernel accept test itself, which would reintroduce the exact oracle-leakage circularity the design forbids (no endpoint may score agreement with kernel-defined gold); a provenance split with a pooled primary is the least-assumption construction available. Revisit condition: if f2b-errors measures substantial X-GOLDCONFLICT mass on the Stage-2 external gold, the wrong-cell inflation member's interpretation must be re-read against that measurement.

claim: f2b-errors closed-set adequacy: the six-category ordered deterministic tree (X-EXTRACT, X-NONENGAGE, X-GOLDCONFLICT, X-EXHAUST-STABLE, X-EXHAUST-WANDER, X-OTHER) is an adequate cause vocabulary for the f2b-transfer Stage-2 kernel-verify-retry failure universe, operationalised by the pre-registered assignment-total gate: X-OTHER residual <= 2% of failure cells. Both the closed set and the 2% bound are design choices. The gate fails closed to INSTRUMENT-INVALID (never a hypothesis outcome), and any post-freeze category change is a new experiment id.
backing_ref: poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json (sha256 4326ae11a60f097f24f93b0c26883df823861c022566344d64a72dca8285164c) assignment_procedure; registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json endpoint sec-assignment-gate + kill_criterion_verbatim; docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md section 5
rationale: The five named categories enumerate exactly the decision paths the pre-declared logged fields can distinguish (final-attempt extraction failure; all-abstain non-engagement; final-accept-yet-ext-wrong gold conflict; no-accept with byte-identical vs differing extracted answers); naming causes the fields cannot decide (mapper/axiom/ambiguity stages this pipeline does not have) was rejected as storytelling (ASM-0030). 2% is tight enough that any systematic unmodelled failure mode (>= ~5 cells at the expected 200-450 failure cells) invalidates the instrument, while a lone anomalous trajectory (e.g., a single-attempt reject cell, which the tree deliberately refuses to name) cannot silently absorb into a named cause. Revisit condition: an INSTRUMENT-INVALID readout on /gates/assignment_total means the tree does not describe the pipeline; the successor is a new taxonomy id, never a widened residual.

claim: f2b-errors primary-inference cluster unit: concept_label is THE resampling unit for the primary concept-cluster percentile bootstrap; template_type and seed are declared cluster keys handled respectively by within-concept crossing and by seed-averaged per-item means plus a leave-one-seed-out jackknife diagnostic - they are not independently resampled.
backing_ref: poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json cluster_keys + declared_exploratory_reanalysis; registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json hypotheses H-ROBUST; docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md section 5
rationale: The G6 threat being priced is concept-level pseudo-replication (250 d-qa-t items over ~108 covered concepts x 4 templates are not 250 independent units); templates are crossed within concept, so resampling concepts carries template dependence with it, making concept_label the coarsest declared unit containing the modelled dependence; seed dependence enters the estimand only through per-item means and is monitored by the jackknife range rather than resampled. Residual risk accepted and disclosed: dependence ACROSS concepts (e.g., shared semantic fields) is not modelled and would make the cluster lower bound anti-conservative; the record prices what it can measure via /analysis/cluster_ci_width_ratio and hands that number to every successor F2-line SAP.

claim: f2b-errors inference constants: the primary uses a percentile (not BCa) concept-cluster bootstrap, B=10000, PRNG seed 20260710, one-sided 95% lower bound, PASS iff lb > 0 (sign robustness; smallest_effect_of_interest 0.0); the pseudo-replication price is the 90% percentile-interval width ratio (concept-cluster over item-level, 2000 item resamples).
backing_ref: analysis/f2b_errors.py (sha256 ce9d15de59100aa235d4c5b04f1f43327de315740f9b9069b49f1fc158ab7d0e) B/BOOT_SEED + analyse(); registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json endpoint primary + design.n_planned.bootstrap; docs/research-plan/08-stats-and-extrapolation.md section 3.2
rationale: Percentile over BCa is deliberate at ~108 clusters: jackknife acceleration estimated over that few resampling units is noisy and the Stage-2 SAP's item-level BCa machinery does not transfer to cluster resampling unchanged, while the percentile interval is monotone-equivariant and plainer to audit. B and the PRNG seed are copied from the Stage-2 SAP constants (analysis/f2b_transfer.py, B=10000, seed 20260710) so no run-time discretion exists. The lb > 0 sign criterion matches the question actually asked - does the SIGN of the Stage-2 lift survive concept clustering - and deliberately claims no new effect size.

claim: f2b-errors conditionality and consumer binding: the primary is evaluated ONLY if the f2b-transfer Stage-2 frozen SAP rejects its null (/analysis/stage2_primary_reject echoed fail-closed from the Stage-2 pinned analysis output); otherwise the record reads INCONCLUSIVE by rule. The pre-declared consumer rule binds from freeze: any claim citing a Stage-2 PASS must co-cite this record's /analysis/cluster_robust, and a FAIL here travels at equal prominence with any such citation. No outcome of this record can flip the frozen f2b-transfer verdict.
backing_ref: registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json endpoint primary + verdict_rules + kill_criterion_verbatim; poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json declared_exploratory_reanalysis.standing; docs/next/resource-optimization-plan.md section 3.5 (R-2)
rationale: Robustness of a lift is undefined without a lift, so conditioning prevents the record from ever converting a Stage-2 null into any claim; declaring the co-citation rule BEFORE Stage-2 unblinds is what gives the sensitivity analysis confirmatory standing under R-2 (an instrument declared after outputs are inspected is retrospective storytelling forever); verdict-immutability preserves the frozen SAP's pure-function verdict discipline - this record qualifies interpretation, never adjudication.

claim: f2b-errors R-2 logging interface: the required_logged_fields declaration (per-cell + per-attempt fields for the kernel-verify-retry and model-alone R1 arms) is an ops-level superset-logging addition to the f2b-transfer Stage-2 harness staging that changes NO arm, endpoint, or analysis of the FROZEN f2b-transfer design (a lawful completion of its PINNED-AT-INPUTS harness_manifest placeholder); the fallback is content-addressed raw per-attempt decoded outputs + verifier decisions, from which assignment is a pure function; if neither lands, /gates/fields_available fails and the record reads INSTRUMENT-INVALID - it never inspects unblinded outputs to reconstruct fields.
backing_ref: poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json required_logged_fields; registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json design.n_planned.r2_logging_declaration + endpoint sec-fields-gate; docs/design-truthstyle-2x2-f2-taxonomy.md section 7 item 2
rationale: Additional logging is observationally passive with respect to the frozen design - no Stage-2 control flow reads the extra fields, so the frozen record's estimand, arms, and pinned analysis script are byte-unchanged; the two-path declaration (structured fields OR raw content-addressed artifacts) plus the fail-closed INSTRUMENT-INVALID exit removes every incentive to retro-fit after unblinding, which is the exact failure R-2 exists to prevent. Ops responsibility is explicitly assigned (the Opus runner, at Stage-2 harness staging) so the handoff cannot silently drop.

claim: f2b-errors mirror-estimand: the recomputed primary effect (seed-averaged per-item means of item_correct_ext_final, kernel-verify-retry k=4 minus model-alone, over common eval items) is the SAME estimand as the frozen f2b-transfer Stage-2 SAP primary effect_size (acc_ext(135M+kernel-verify, fixed k=4) - acc_ext(135M-alone)), so the concept-cluster re-analysis is a sensitivity analysis of THAT inference rather than a different quantity.
backing_ref: registry/experiments/f2b-errors.json design.dependent_vars primary_effect_cluster_lb; analysis/f2b_errors.py analyse() item_means; registry/experiments/f2b-transfer.json (frozen_sha256 b341a0901e12023d3c56bdc196be0b9c492c7d348f988416d7e9c43aade20879) + analysis/f2b_transfer.py effect_size
rationale: Both quantities are means of the same per-item external-gold correctness indicators over the same 250-item d-qa-t eval set (corpus pin byte-identical to the frozen f2b-transfer pin) at the same arms, k, and seeds; the only difference is the resampling scheme, which is precisely the manipulation under study. Mechanical revisit condition at final phase: /analysis/primary_effect_point is compared against the Stage-2 pinned analysis output's effect_size - a material mismatch means the mirror failed (field-definition drift in the logging handoff) and the sensitivity reading must be reported as qualified, never silently retained.

claim: f2b-errors retrospective twin quarantine: applying the identical taxonomy + cluster re-analysis to results-log/f2b-replicate.jsonl is phase:'exploratory' (f2b-replicate is already unblinded), quarantined, uncitable as confirmation, and used solely as pricing information for successor F2-line SAPs; the quarantine suffices because the twin reads a different record's logs and shares no input bytes with the confirmatory instrument's Stage-2 inputs.
rationale: The twin buys calibration of the cluster-CI width ratio at $0 without touching the confirmatory path: R-2 standing on f2b-replicate is unavailable (its outputs were inspected long ago), so the exploratory label is forced, and keeping the twin inside the same frozen design rather than running it ad hoc pins its procedure to the same hashed taxonomy bytes, making even the exploratory number non-discretionary.

claim: The 'monotone coverage gradient' used to place the define-op internal-coverage census (self-authored internal define-checkability 0.7710 -> friendly-NL m0b vocabulary coverage 0.3542 -> proposition roll-up engagement ~0.006 -> Mathlib ~0.000) is a cross-instrument QUALITATIVE FRAMING DEVICE, not a single measured monotone curve: its four points measure DIFFERENT quantities (internal define-checkability of self-authored onto-obo definitional records; m0b content-word vocabulary membership on molecules-v0; idea-B proposition roll-up engagement; Mathlib checkability) on DIFFERENT corpora with NON-COMMENSURABLE denominators. It is used ONLY to place 0.7710 qualitatively at the self-authored (easiest) end and to license the NEGATIVE inference 'internal-substrate completeness cannot upper-bound any external-corpus point'; it NEVER licenses quantitative interpolation between points or a single-decay-law claim connecting them.
backing_ref: registry/assessments/define-op-census.json (coverage_gradient_placement); poc/define-op-census/RUN-LOG.md; registry/verdicts/m0b.json (0.3542 @ molecules-v0); registry/assessments/compression-census.json (~0.6% roll-up engagement); docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md SS1c/SS2d
rationale: The gradient is an interpretive aid for placing a self-authored-substrate number among external corpora; treating it as a measured curve would invite a false 'coverage at intermediate difficulty' interpolation. The scope bounds it supports (0.7710 is not kappa_B, bounds nothing external) rest independently on the MEASURED three-legs discipline, so nothing rests on the gradient being a real curve. Revisit condition: if a single instrument ever measures these regimes on a common denominator, replace this framing with that measurement.

claim: Internal define-checkability of the self-authored onto-obo substrate (0.7710 post-8es; 0.8032 on the later foreign-filler stub tier) does NOT predict any external-benchmark kappa_B value for the define-op: the binding third leg (mapper parse of a real WiC/def-MMLU stem into the closed grammar) is untouched by this census, and the define-checkable slice is biomedical/domain-skewed (def-MMLU largely non-biomedical and WiC general-vocabulary, so yield may be small or ~0). The DIRECTION - a more mature internal substrate widens the potential external breadth surface - is named but its magnitude is unmeasured. This datum is a kappa_B breadth-SUBSTRATE readiness signal that INFORMS the efficiency-thesis breadth story but does NOT gate the feasibility verdict, whose bottom lines rest on de-confounding f2b, the NL boundary, and the g2/g3/g8/g9 semantics core.
backing_ref: poc/define-op-census/RUN-LOG.md; docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md SS4/SS7; docs/next/architecture-ladder.md SS10.1 (b-cov kappa_B census); docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md SS1c/SS4
resolution_path: The b-cov define-lane census (architecture-ladder.md SS10.1) run over EXTERNAL WiC/def-MMLU items with gold-parse and mapper-parse counted separately - the only measurement that yields a kappa_B number - blocked on the WiC/def-MMLU data unblock (WiC 401-gated, def-MMLU unpinned) + the mapper-parse leg. Until then this entry is never a premise for any schedule, budget, verdict, or design decision.

backing_ref: docs/next/io-compression-ideas.md section 3.7 (K-B0 kill text, verbatim); registry/assessments/compression-census.json (interpretive park against this bar; measured savings 0.399-0.444% of word mass, poc/compression-census/results/b-e0-tinystories.json sha256 6a1b53f9)
claim: The K-B0 engagement floor for idea B (compositional roll-up compression) is 2% of workload prefill tokens: below ~2% achievable corpus savings the roll-up mechanism is not worth its standing complexity (ALGORITHM_VERSION surface, dictionary maintenance, extra parse pass) and the idea parks behind coverage growth and/or the OR extension with the census as re-entry gate. This is a sanity DEFAULT to be reset at freeze of any idea-B experiment; no freeze has occurred, so no formal kill can fire - the compression-census PARK is an interpretive conclusion measured against this stipulated bar.
rationale: A pre-stated order-of-magnitude bar was needed before reading the census number; 2% prefill-token savings is the design's own threshold under which the mechanism cannot pay for its complexity. The measured shortfall (~4.5-5x below the bar on the deliberately favourable corpus) is robust to any plausible freeze-time reset within an order of magnitude, which is why the interpretive PARK does not wait for a freeze.
resolution_path: Set the binding floor at freeze if idea B is ever taken to a frozen experiment; until then the B-E0 census re-run after each kernel/mapper coverage-growth wave (re-entry gate, stub b-e0-reentry-gate) is measured against the freeze-time floor.

backing_ref: docs/next/io-compression-ideas.md section 3.7; poc/compression-census/results/b-e0-tinystories.md (scope-honesty paragraph, sha256 ae2538dc); registry/assessments/compression-census.json (stub b-e0-second-corpus)
claim: The B-E0 census design stipulates a second, less-favourable census corpus (instruction/QA register) to be named at freeze; it was NOT run (no such corpus available locally under the Tier-0 $0/no-fetch constraint). The idea-B PARK does not depend on it: the favourable-corpus measurement alone is ~5x below the K-B0 bar, so the second corpus is negative-completion, not a gate.
rationale: Running the second corpus can only strengthen the park (direction reading registered separately as ASM-0102); deferring it spends nothing and blocks nothing. Registering the stipulation keeps the census's planned two-corpus negative record honest about being half-complete.
resolution_path: Name and pin the second corpus at any idea-B freeze, or run the census on a locally-available instruction/QA corpus when one lands (stub b-e0-second-corpus, $0 CPU).

backing_ref: poc/compression-census/results/b-e0-tinystories.md (dominant abstain cause unmapped-word = 2,068,450, an order of magnitude above the next cause); registry/verdicts/m0b.json (coverage 0.3542 on the friendliest measured corpus at molecules-v0)
claim: On a second, less-favourable corpus (instruction/QA register), B-E0 roll-up engagement would be equal or lower than the 0.592-0.643% of expanded word mass measured on TinyStories-valid - direction only, magnitude unmeasured.
rationale: Mechanically grounded direction: engagement is bounded by vocabulary coverage, the dominant abstain cause is unmapped-word, and TinyStories-valid is the deliberately favourable ~1.5k-lemma m0b continuity domain - larger vocabularies mean more unmapped-word abstention. Used ONLY to explain why a second corpus is not a rescue path for idea B; NEVER a premise - the park rests on the favourable-corpus measurement alone.
resolution_path: Run the B-E0 census on the stipulated second corpus (stub b-e0-second-corpus); the result completes the planned two-corpus negative record and either confirms or bounds this direction reading.

backing_ref: poc/compression-census/results/a-e2-blocker.json (consequence field: no pinned host tokenizer on box, sha256 a558ef25); registry/assessments/compression-census.json (does_not_license, host-BPE bound)
claim: Word-mass denomination is an adequate proxy for the K-B0 floor comparison: B-E0 savings are fractions of expanded word mass (no pinned host tokenizer exists locally under Tier-0 $0/no-fetch) while the floor is written in prefill tokens; the ~5x-below-floor DIRECTION is treated as robust to the currency change, and the exact multiple stays tokenizer-dependent and is never quoted as a token number.
rationale: The only currency available at Tier 0. The engaged fragments are short, high-frequency English spans (is-a and simple-clause strata dominate), which BPE tokenizes at low fertility, so host-BPE re-denomination is not expected to inflate the engaged share by anything approaching the ~5x shortfall. The choice of proxy currency for the comparison is a CHOICE, hence STIPULATED even though the underlying tokenizer absence is measured.
resolution_path: Fetch the pinned SmolLM2 tokenizer.json (mandatory R1 tokenizer; dual-use - unblocks host-BPE currency for both A-E2 and a re-denominated B-E0) once the maintainer authorizes the external fetch (stub a-e2-tokenizer-unblock); re-express the B-E0 savings in host-BPE tokens and retire this proxy.

claim: The kot-query/1 define-op `definitional` endorsement record's `subject` field is a minted onto-obo corpus-marker URN (one stable urn:kot: URN naming the endorsed corpus), NOT a per-concept URN and NOT the shard string. The endorsement's admitted set is keyed off source.{corpus,shard,sourceVersion} (shard membership), so `subject` names the endorsing governance act, is never consulted by the define-op definitional index, and does not affect any coverage count; a concept URN appears in `subject` only in the per-concept disendorsement override case, which is out of scope for the corpus-scoped v0 records. This pins the convention the define-op census left open (staged records carried __PENDING_FABLE_SUBJECT_PIN__, fail-closed).
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md SS3.1/SS10.1 (subject-pin DECISION); poc/define-op-census/RUN-LOG.md boundary-stop #1; registry/assessments/define-op-census.json boundary_stops[0] + stub define-subject-pin; data/axioms-definitional-v0/defn-onto-obo-{go,so,mondo}.json (three v0 records carry a minted corpus-marker URN and validate); tools/axiom/kot_axiom.py _build_definitional_index (keys off shard membership, not subject)
rationale: A production endorsement subject convention was needed before bead 46f could finalize the endorsement records mechanically; the census flagged it as a Fable design pin (boundary-stop #1). Corpus-marker granularity mirrors onto-obo's existing corpus-level provenance.license, keeps the endorsement act legible/cheap, and the index's shard-membership keying makes the choice non-load-bearing for the coverage count while still pinning a valid, byte-stable convention.
resolution_path: Realized in data/axioms-definitional-v0/ (three records validate). If a federation later needs per-concept disendorsement, that override path (concept URN in subject) is added as a v1 grammar note without changing this corpus-scoped default.

claim: The define-op SSC5 definitional-uniqueness item-eligibility filter is operationalized as an inverse-index collision count over the SS2.2 DEFINE-MATCH canonical form: build inv[key] -> sorted set of licensed concept URNs where key = canonicalise(defn[X]) (genus as sorted urn:kot: set + differentiae as sorted (relation-URN,filler-URN) set, serialised deterministically) over only resolved defn entries; for a candidate-bearing benchmark item whose candidate resolves to key_item, let n = |inv.get(key_item)|; the item is define-checkable only if n == 1, is DROPPED from the checkable slice as INELIGIBLE_DEFN_COLLISION iff n >= 2 (a census-eligibility exclusion, NOT an engine refusal — DEFINE-MATCH stays sound per subject), and n == 0 is the ordinary no-match case handled by DEFINE-MATCH, never by C5. The filter is pure census (bead hu10) instrumentation over the already-built engine index and requires no engine or mapper change.
backing_ref: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md SS6 C5 (operationalization) + SS2.2 (canonical form) + SS7.2/SS10.1; bead kernel-of-truth-hu10 (b-cov define-lane, SSC5 filter); tools/axiom/kot_axiom.py _canonicalise_candidate + _build_definitional_index (the canonical form + index this reuses)
rationale: Bead hu10 needed the C5 filter specified precisely enough to be a mechanical build; the memo previously described the collision hazard conceptually but did not pin the algorithm (index scope, match relation, threshold, exclusion-vs-refusal distinction). Reusing the engine's SS2.2 canonical form and the endorsed defn index makes C5 deterministic given the endorsed index + census hash, and keeps it disjoint from engine soundness (the op answers 'is this X's definition' per subject; C5 only guards item-level question well-formedness).
resolution_path: Implemented in the b-cov define-lane census (bead hu10): report N dropped by C5 alongside N_checkable/N_total per census row. The DEFINE-MATCH per-subject soundness audit (ASM-DEF-2 / ASM-0016 lineage) is the check that C5 exclusion never masks an engine unsoundness.

claim: Interpretive scope rule for the B-prime INSTRUMENT-INVALID outcome: the label licenses statements about THIS probe operationalization only (final-prompt-position replacement transplant + any-cell exact-gold rescue on the effectively two-candidate entity form at R3); the internal-write delivery cell of the delivery topology remains UNTESTED - neither refuted nor supported. In particular the control-favouring paired result (4 real-only vs 29 ctrl-only discordants) may NOT be read as evidence against latent layer-timing headroom, because the self-vector's output-preserving coherence (patched-gen-differs-from-text-only rate ~0.27 for own-vector vs 0.603 for foreign layer-22 vectors) mechanically suppresses real-arm flip opportunities independent of any latent content; symmetrically the 0.400 real rescue may not be read as evidence for it.
backing_ref: poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_summary.json sha256 539040e93c78ec244ad20f77ee32ab7cf19358add5033c525851cea799f1ef7c; poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_rows.jsonl sha256 f45b12e06ec7010d9148611f4dd11a833d69ecac4855d3452109ad8b76522ea4 (recount in registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json); docs/next/nsk1-bprime-stage0-spec.md section 5 rule 1
rationale: An invalid instrument returns information about itself, not about the quantity it was built to measure; fixing this scope rule prevents the B-prime numbers from being re-narrated in either direction (as a channel kill or as latent-headroom support) once they age. Revisit condition: a redesigned probe with a control-unpassable read-out supersedes this rule for its own results.

claim: Successor-probe design constraint (binding on any future Stage-0-shaped internal-channel probe on an effectively two-candidate form): the read-out must be one a content-free perturbation cannot pass IN EXPECTATION - (a) source-keyed discrimination (patch vectors from a counterfactual pair, same item x two bridge identities; success = output tracks the injected source's key; chance exactly 0.5 per item by construction, and a shuffled control has no key to track) and/or (b) a paired continuous margin read-out (delta logit gold-vs-bridge under patch, real minus shuffled, symmetric under content-free perturbation) - with (c) bounded cell multiplicity (no any-of-N-cells compounding) and (d) a delivery operator constrained by the measured P2 breakage (additive low-alpha or non-final-position writes, not wholesale final-position replacement, which broke 98.5 percent of correct-item cells content-indifferently). The bare any-cell exact-gold rescue criterion is retired for such forms.
backing_ref: registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json (rescue-given-output-change recount: 0.43-0.53 in all four arm x source-layer strata, source-blind); heatmap_breakage_c100 + rescue_p2/rescue_p2_ctrl in poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_summary.json sha256 539040e9...; ASM-0041 (the predecessor criterion whose revisit clause fired)
rationale: B-prime's confound is structural (any output-changing perturbation hits gold at ~0.5 in a two-candidate space; multiplicity compounds it), so re-running with more items or seeds cannot fix it; only a read-out that is control-unpassable by construction can. Registered as a CHOICE about future instrument design, not a measurement. Revisit condition: forms with a demonstrably larger effective answer space may relax (a)/(b) with a fresh per-cell null analysis in the spec.

claim: Direction-only mechanism reading: ANY single-position late-layer vector injected at the final prompt position at R3 on this form perturbs decoding into occasionally-correct names at a source-blind ~0.5 rate-given-change, so single-position injection probes with discrete gold-hit read-outs will remain confounded on this form regardless of source construction. The measured core (rescue-given-output-change 0.43-0.53 across all four B-prime strata; foreign-vector change rate 0.603 vs own-vector ~0.27) is MEASURED-exploratory; the generalization to other injection operators, positions, and hosts is not measured.
backing_ref: registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json analyst_recount; poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_rows.jsonl sha256 f45b12e0...; the runner's flagged indicative reading in poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_run.log (non-binding)
resolution_path: A redesigned probe under the ASM-0111 constraints measures this directly: if a source-keyed contrast separates real from shuffled where the naive read-out could not, the confound was the read-out (this entry resolves confirmed-as-instrument-issue); if nothing separates, the entry stays direction-only and is never a premise for any kill, schedule, or budget.
